title: E-Commerce Store with Next.js
description: Full e-commerce store from zero: product catalog, authentication, database, product image uploads, Stripe Checkout payments, transactional order emails, error monitoring, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Scaffold the Next.js application with App Router and TypeScript
Add Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Install shadcn/ui for product cards, cart drawer, and checkout forms
Set up Prisma ORM with a Product, Order, and User schema
Add Clerk for customer authentication and account management
Set up S3 file uploads for product images
Integrate Stripe Checkout for payments and webhooks to fulfill orders
Send transactional emails for order confirmation and shipping updates
Add Sentry error monitoring for the checkout flow
Deploy the store to Vercel with production environment variables
